mode.title: Connection Mode
mode.description: How the plugin connects to your devices. Use Cloud for the standard Tuya Cloud API, Local for direct LAN communication (no cloud needed), or Both to run cloud and local simultaneously.

local.title: Local Settings
local.description: Configure local LAN devices. For help getting local keys, see the Local Keys Setup Guide.

autoDiscoverDevices.title: Auto-Discover Devices
autoDiscoverDevices.description: Automatically find Tuya devices on the local network via UDP broadcast.

discoverTimeout.title: Discovery Timeout (seconds)
discoverTimeout.description: How long to listen for UDP broadcast replies. Default: 5 seconds.

rediscoverInterval.title: Rediscovery Interval (seconds)
rediscoverInterval.description: How often to re-run device discovery to detect devices that go offline and return (e.g. after WiFi reset or IP change). Set to 0 to disable. Default: 900 seconds (15 minutes).

devices.title: Manual Devices
devices.description: List individual devices if auto-discovery does not find them or if you want to provide a local key.

category.title: Type
category.description: Select the device type or category code for proper accessory type detection.

tuyaDeviceId.title: Device ID
tuyaDeviceId.description: The Tuya device ID (same as the cloud device ID).

tuyaKey.title: Local Key
tuyaKey.description: The 16-character AES local key for direct communication.

ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: Fixed IP address. Leave blank to use auto-discovery.

name.title: Name
name.description: Anything you'd like to use to identify this device.

protocolVersion.title: Protocol Version
protocolVersion.description: Tuya local protocol version. Leave blank to auto-detect.

dpMapping.title: Custom DP Mapping (Advanced)
dpMapping.description: Override default DP-to-function mappings as JSON. Example: {"switch_1": 1, "bright_value": 2, "temp_value": 3}

condition.functionBody: return ((model.local && model.local.devices && model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]]) ? model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]].category : undefined) && ((model.local && model.local.devices && model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]]) ? model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]].category : undefined) !== '';

return ((model.local && model.local.devices && model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]]) ? model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]].category : undefined) === 'cz' || ((model.local && model.local.devices && model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]]) ? model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]].category : undefined) === 'pc' || ((model.local && model.local.devices && model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]]) ? model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]].category : undefined) === 'wkcz';

isZigbeeGateway.title: Zigbee Gateway
isZigbeeGateway.description: Mark this device as a Zigbee gateway. Usually auto-detected if other devices reference this device as their parent.

parentDeviceId.title: Parent Gateway Device ID
parentDeviceId.description: For Zigbee sub-devices: the Tuya device ID of the parent gateway. Commands are routed through the parent's TCP connection using the Zigbee CID.

zigbeeChildId.title: Zigbee Child ID (CID)
zigbeeChildId.description: For Zigbee sub-devices: the 16-character hex node ID assigned by the gateway (e.g. '0011223344556601'). Required when parentDeviceId is set.

childDpMapping.title: Child DP Mapping (Override)
childDpMapping.description: For Zigbee sub-devices: optional DP mapping override. If provided, replaces the parent's DP mapping for this child device. Useful when child DPs differ from the gateway.

condition.functionBody: return ((model.local && model.local.devices && model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]]) ? model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]].parentDeviceId : undefined) !== undefined && ((model.local && model.local.devices && model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]]) ? model.local.devices[arrayIndices[0]].parentDeviceId : undefined) !== '';

childCategory.title: Child Category Override
childCategory.description: For Zigbee sub-devices: optional category override. If provided, replaces the parent's category for this child device. Useful when child is a different device type than the gateway.

homeWhitelist.title: Whitelisted Home IDs
homeWhitelist.description: An optional list of Home IDs to match. If blank, all homes are matched.

id.title: ID
id.description: Device ID or Product ID or `global`

unbridged.title: Unbridge
unbridged.description: Would you like to make this device be an external device?

device_id.title: DeviceID
device_id.description: Device ID. Often Sub Device ID. See Accessory Information > Serial Number.

index.title: Characteristic Index
index.description: Usually 1. If Accessory has more functions, it might be 2 or more.

generateWeatherAccessory.title: Generate Weather Accessory
generateWeatherAccessory.description: Generate Current Weather at Home Location. Gets Temperature and Humidity.

weatherAPI.title: Weather API
weatherAPI.description:
Open-Meteo : For non-commercial use. [Weather data by Open-Meteo.com](https://open-meteo.com/)
Tuya : Requires authorization for Weather Service.

debugLevel.title: Debug Level
debugLevel.description: An optional list of strings seperated with comma `,`. `api` represents for API and MQTT log, device ID represents for specific device log. If blank, all logs are outputed.
